revision.content:
This page and the process it describes is out of date and no longer neccessary. We separated with the School Factory in 2015 an no longer report any information to them. This page only exists for historical purposes.

----

The Space Federation has an accident/injury reporting policy which we need to follow. In the event someone is injured this document needs to be filled out and given to any officer of Bloominglabs. There should be 2 printed copies of this form inside the first-aid kit at all times.
*[https://atrium.schoolfactory.org/sites/atrium.schoolfactory.org/files/accident_report_template_3.pdf accident_report_template]

For officers, this is the online submission form to report with:
* [https://docs.google.com/spreadsheet/viewform?formkey=dFQ2bkdESUFNUnVERG9KNi1Kd0FxWWc6MQ Online Accident Report Form]

Additional information about the School Factory's injury reporting policy:
* [https://atrium.schoolfactory.org/spacefed/node/107778]
